description: Known CMSIS-DAP probe vendor IDs used to narrow the WebUSB chooser dialog (UX hint only). The authoritative CMSIS-DAP identification is performed by checking the USB Product String in webusb-transport.js.

vendorIds.$comment: Microchip (Atmel) — EDBG (Xplained Pro) / JTAG-ICE 3 / Atmel-ICE / Power Debugger / Arduino Zero EDBG / EDBG w/ Mass Storage / Commercial EDBG / Kraken / nEDBG (Curiosity Nano) / MPLAB PICkit 4 CMSIS-DAP
FTDI / Sipeed — RV-Debugger Lite (FT2232-class chip repurposed for JTAG/CMSIS-DAP)
Nuvoton — Nu-Link2-ME ICE/MSC/VCOM / Nu-Link2-Pro ICE/MSC/VCOM / Nu-Link2 HID FW UPGRADE
Renesas — RA CMSIS-DAP Port (v1.0.0 HID, v2.0.0 WinUSB)
STMicroelectronics — ST-Link v2 / ST-Link on Nucleo / STM32F103C8T6 DAP_SWO / STLINK-V3MINI (DAPv1+VCP, DAPv2+VCP, DAPv2, v1+v2)
ARM / mbed — DAPLink / MBED CMSIS-DAP (default VID shared by many third-party clones, MuseLab probes and BBC micro:bit)
pid.codes (Community) — Rusty Probe / HS-Probe (open-source hardware shared VID)
Maxim Integrated — MAX32625PICO CDC (native bootloader mode; transitions to 0x0D28:0x0204 once DAPLink firmware boots)
NXP — LPCScrypt Target / ROM / LPC-Link2 / MCU-LINK
Arduino — Nicla Sense ME onboard debugger
SeeedStudio — XIAO MG24 / nRF54L15 XIAO / Seeeduino XIAO (DAPv2)
WCH (Nanjing Qinheng) — WCH-Link (non-standard/exotic VID, possibly counterfeit or misconfigured units)
Raspberry Pi — Debug Probe (RP2040-based, UART bridge + CMSIS-DAP composite)
WCH (Nanjing Qinheng) — WCH-LinkE Recovery / ISP mode (exposed when firmware is bricked)
Keil Software / ARM — LPC-Link-II CMSIS-DAP / OPEN-SDA CMSIS-DAP / Keil ULINK2 CMSIS-DAP / Keil ULINKplus CMSIS-DAP
